services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Choose from professional full-service or convenient self-service options

full.title: Full-Service Wash
full.desc: Complete exterior and interior cleaning by our professional team. Sit back and relax while we make your car shine.

self.title: Self-Service Wash
self.desc: State-of-the-art self-service bays equipped with high-pressure washers, foam brushes, and vacuum stations.

detail.title: Premium Detailing
detail.desc: Deep cleaning and restoration services including waxing, polishing, and interior shampooing.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect package for your car care needs

self.name: Self-Service
self.tagline: Perfect for DIY car care enthusiasts

why.title: Why Choose SparkleWash?
why.subtitle: We're committed to providing the best car care experience

open.title: Open 24/7
open.desc: Our self-service bays are available around the clock for your convenience.

eco.title: Eco-Friendly
eco.desc: We use biodegradable soaps and water recycling systems to protect the environment.

staff.title: Expert Staff
staff.desc: Our trained professionals ensure the highest quality service every time.

guarantee.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
guarantee.desc: Not happy with the results? We'll rewash your car for free.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it - hear from our satisfied customers

cards.name: Sarah Johnson
cards.text: SparkleWash is absolutely amazing! They've been taking care of my car for over a year now. The attention to detail is incredible, and my car always looks brand new when I pick it up.

cards.name: Michael Chen
cards.text: I love the self-service option! Open 24/7 means I can wash my car whenever it fits my schedule. The equipment is always well-maintained and the facilities are spotless.

cards.name: Emily Rodriguez
cards.text: The premium detailing service exceeded my expectations. They got stains out of my seats that I thought were permanent. Worth every penny!

cards.name: David Thompson
cards.text: Professional, friendly staff and eco-friendly practices. I appreciate that they care about the environment while providing top-notch service.

gallery.title: Before & After Gallery
gallery.subtitle: See the incredible transformations we deliver

contact.subtitle: Find us at our convenient location or give us a call
